evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000)); r.version=(await fetch('version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json()).catch(()=>({}))).version; try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,4500)); const price=document.querySelector('.cat-price[data-cat-precio]'); r.clickAbreCurvas=false; if(price){price.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1200)); r.clickAbreCurvas=!!document.getElementById('pcCurvasModal'); document.getElementById('pcCurvasModal')?.remove();} MOS.abrirModalPrecioRapido('IDPRO0001147'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1000)); const inp=document.getElementById('qpInput'); if(inp){inp.value='40';inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,500)); r.cascadaTieneChipPct=document.getElementById('qpBasePct')?.style.display!=='none'; r.pctTexto=(document.getElementById('qpBasePct')||{}).textContent; r.tieneAntes=(document.getElementById('qpBaseAntes')||{}).textContent; return r; })()
